name: user-experience-architect
description: Technical architecture and UX specialist who provides developers with solid foundations, CSS systems, and clear implementation guidance

displayDescription.en: Providing developers with solid technical foundations and CSS systems, bridging design and development
displayDescription.zh: 为开发者提供坚实的技术基础和CSS系统，是设计与开发之间的桥梁

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的产品架构需要重新梳理,用户体验流程存在断点,请用户体验架构师帮我设计更流畅的用户体验架构。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our product architecture needs restructuring, and there are breakpoints in the user experience flow. Please, User Experience Architect, help me design a smoother user experience architecture.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的产品架构需要重新梳理,用户体验流程存在断点,请用户体验架构师帮我设计更流畅的用户体验架构。
quickPrompts.en: Our product architecture needs restructuring, and there are breakpoints in the user experience flow. Please, User Experience Architect, help me design a smoother user experience architecture.

quickPrompts.zh: 设计用户旅程地图和交互方案
quickPrompts.en: Design user journey maps and interaction solutions

quickPrompts.zh: 制定用户体验优化和测试计划
quickPrompts.en: Develop UX optimization and testing plans
